rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.048, which governs ARD committee duties for special education IEPs. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A student's admission, review, and dismissal committee shall develop a student's individualized education program under Section 29.005
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns special education ARD committee duties, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
